rationale: Section 25.01 governs preparation and posting of appraisal records, not exemption amounts. Increasing the homestead exemption under §11.13(b) does not alter appraisal record preparation duties or contracting rules.
quote: the chief appraiser shall prepare appraisal records listing all property that is taxable in the district and stating the appraised value of each.
_note: No conflict; §25.01 addresses appraisal record procedures, not exemption thresholds.
